title: Velvety Greek Yogurt Biryani
description: A creamy, kid-friendly fusion dish that marries Greek yogurt with aromatic biryani masala, perfect for a quick, comforting meal.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk the Greek yogurt with biryani masala, garlic, ginger, lemon juice, and salt until smooth.
Add the cooked rice to the yogurt mixture, folding gently so the rice is evenly coated.
Fold in the steamed mixed vegetables and sliced onions, ensuring even distribution.
Transfer the mixture to a lightly oiled saucepan and cook over medium heat for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally until the mixture is heated through and slightly golden.
Turn off the heat, stir in fresh cilantro and a splash of olive oil for added sheen.
Serve hot, garnishing with extra cilantro if desired. Optionally top with a dollop of plain yogurt for extra creaminess.
